title: Hydrophace minor
taxonomy: Hydrophace minor is a genus of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. The classification of Hydrophace minor is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, class Magnoliopsida, order Gentianales, family Gentianaceae, genus Hydrophace, and species H. minor. Hydrophace minor is a small genus of plants that are native to tropical Asia. Further classification may also include its infraspecific categories. More detailed and up-to-date information on its classification may be found in current botanical resources.
